name: muti-mind
description: Product Owner hero acting as Vision Keeper and Prioritization Engine (requires graphthulhu MCP server)

artifacts_produced.description: Decision artifact evaluating quality reports against backlog items
JSON representation of a backlog item

artifacts_consumed.description: Quality reports from Gaze for acceptance evaluation

opencode_agents.name: muti-mind-po
opencode_agents.description: AI persona and decision framework for backlog management

opencode_commands.name: /muti-mind.backlog-show
opencode_commands.description: Display full details of an item

opencode_commands.name: /muti-mind.sync-push
opencode_commands.description: Push local backlog items to GitHub Issues

opencode_commands.name: /muti-mind.sync-pull
opencode_commands.description: Pull GitHub Issues into the local backlog

opencode_commands.name: /muti-mind.sync
opencode_commands.description: Bidirectional sync including interactive conflict detection

opencode_commands.name: /muti-mind.prioritize
opencode_commands.description: Invoke Muti-Mind AI persona to score and rank the backlog

opencode_commands.name: /muti-mind.generate-stories
opencode_commands.description: Invoke Muti-Mind AI persona to generate user stories
